title: alcea ficifolia var. glabrata
intro: Alcea ficifolia var. glabrata is a specific variety of the perennial hollyhock plant, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alcea ficifolia var. glabrata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
